title: Heiress Contract Arc
description: A reference-dependent vertical-drama quartet that locks one heiress-and-bodyguard cast pairing, then extends it across rooftop, rain, wedding, and hospital chapter posters.
creative_direction: This package behaves like a short-drama campaign rollout. Image 01 establishes the two leads, the emotional hierarchy, and the narrow-screen poster grammar; images 02-04 must preserve their identities and relationship tension while shifting chapter settings and episode-hook mood.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Heiress Contract Arc
en.description: A reference-dependent vertical-drama quartet preserving one lead couple and serialized poster grammar across four chapter hooks.

zh-CN.title: 继承人契约篇
zh-CN.description: 一组依赖参考图的竖屏短剧海报，围绕同一对主角延展四张分集封面。
